proposals.title: Evergreen Home Services proposal for Maria Lopez
proposals.problemSummary: Maria Lopez needs a reliable storm roof repair solution in Austin with emergency urgency. The request mentions: Water is coming through the ceiling near the guest bedroom after last night storm. Customer wants a temporary patch today and a full estimate for permanent repair.
proposals.recommendedSolution: We recommend a scoped storm roof repair package priced at $3,069, with the final price confirmed after field validation.
scopeOfWork: Confirm site details, constraints, and customer priorities before work begins.
Prepare crew, materials, and project schedule based on the approved estimate.
Complete the work with progress updates and a closeout quality check.
Send completion notes, care instructions, and a review request when appropriate.
proposals.timeline: Priority scheduling: first available emergency slot after approval.
proposals.warrantyTerms: Workmanship is covered for 30 days unless the final signed estimate states otherwise.
exclusions: Hidden structural issues, permit fees, and customer-requested scope changes are excluded.
No final price is guaranteed until the customer approves the written estimate.
proposals.closingNote: Reply to approve the estimate or call Evergreen Home Services to reserve the next available service window.

reviews.body: Fast roof patch after the storm. The crew explained the permanent repair options clearly.
The technician was late, the invoice was expensive, and nobody replied when I asked for a refund. I may call my attorney.
Reliable seasonal maintenance. Scheduling could be a little faster, but the work has always been professional.

reviewResponses.body: Maria Lopez, thank you for choosing Evergreen Home Services. We appreciate the kind words and are glad the team delivered a strong experience.
complianceNotes: No incentive offered for changing or posting a review.

reviewResponses.body: Anya Patel, thank you for raising this. We are sorry your experience did not meet expectations. We cannot discuss account details publicly, but our manager would like to review this directly. Please contact Evergreen Home Services so we can look into the situation and decide the right next step.
complianceNotes: No incentive offered for changing or posting a review.

directions.name: BidFlow Local
directions.targetCustomers: Local service businesses: contractors, repair teams, cleaning, field services, boutique B2B service firms.
directions.priceAnchor: $49-$299/month plus optional setup; replaces spreadsheet quoting and missed follow-up labor.
directions.whyNow: SMBs are adopting narrow AI workflows and need revenue tools that turn leads into approved estimates faster.
risks: Service pricing varies by location and job conditions.
Needs human approval before binding quotes.
Vertical templates must be specific to win trust.

directions.name: ReputeLoop
directions.targetCustomers: Local businesses with review-driven demand: home services, clinics, beauty, restaurants, repair, fitness.
directions.priceAnchor: $39-$199/month; lower than Podium/Birdeye while covering review response, risk handling, and winback.
directions.whyNow: Reviews are a direct buying signal, while fake-review enforcement makes compliant workflows more valuable.
risks: Must not generate fake reviews or review gating.
SMS/email consent and unsubscribe must be respected.
